section.div: Source code of extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
Source extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
This script will fetch seasonal anime data from MyAnimeList (both Normal and Hentai) and Hentai anime data from NekoPoi and save it in a specified format.
This script will automatically rename any NekoPoi titles (well its for all video titles btw, but mainly used for NekoPoi)

Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Romance

div.div: Kimi no Koto ga Dai Dai Dai Dai Daisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo 2nd Season

The second season of Kimi no Koto ga Dai Dai Dai Dai Daisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo. Rentaro meets new soulmates, balancing comedic chaos and heartfelt moments as his relationships deepen. (Source: Crunchyroll News)

Based on the erotic game by Lune.
Meikoku Gakuen is a school where they will face the Dark Ages. At that time of darkness, all schoolgirls will feel very aroused so they can not escape the sensation of pleasure. There is only one way that can stop them from excessive lust in the dark ages is by giving sperm that already contain magic.
(Source: Nekopoi and Has Been Translated and Edited)

Magic is a product of neither legends nor fairy tales, but instead has become a technology of reality since a time unknown to people. Supernatural power became a technology systematized through magic, while magic became a technical skill. A "Supernatural Power User" became a "Magic Technician." Magic Technicians (in short, Magicians) are nurtured through Magic High Schools and Universities.
This is a story about:
Tatsuya, a defective elder brother low achiever. Miyuki, a perfect, flawless younger sister high achiever. After both siblings entered a Magic High School, The stage of daily turbulence was unveiled—.
Slime Taoshite 300-nen, Shiranai Uchi ni Level MAX ni Nattemashita
Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life

An at-home comedy about a powerful girl who doesn’t work too hard!(⋈◍ ˃ᴗ˂ ◍)。✧♡
After dying of overwork in the real world, I’m reincarnated as an immortal witch, and I spend 300 years enjoying a relaxing life. At some point, though, I end up at level 99! All those years spent killing slimes to make the money to pay the bills gave me a ton of experience points… Rumors of the level 99 witch spread, and soon I’m up to my ears in curious adventurers, duelist dragons, and even a monster girl calling me her mom! “This isn’t a dojo, so don’t come here to fight me…!”
I’ve never been on an adventure, but I’m the strongest in the world… What’s going to happen to my relaxing life?!
(Source: Crunchyroll)

Having spent his childhood in the slums, Hajime Shinonome desperately sought strength to survive.
Now, he enjoys a peaceful and carefree life as a resident adventurer of the Komai Village.
One day, during a quest, he ventured into a dungeon and finds a young girl being partially eaten by a weakest kind of monster, a slime!
The girl's name was Lirui. Having been abandoned by her parents, she had no place to go and entered the dungeon alone in order to stay alive. Hajime couldn't just leave her there, so he took her back to the village to live with him! (Source: Crunchyroll)
Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life

The story of Jii-san Baa-san Wakagaeru follows Shouzou and Ine, an elderly couple who are living a quiet life in a farming village in Aomori Prefecture. After eating a mysterious apple that they discover on their apple farm, Shozo and Ine spontaneously regain their youth, but even after being reinvigorated they continue to live life at a grandparent-ly pace. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

Based on the erotic game by Tanuki Soft.
Kiyoshi Tachikawa runs a candy store located in a small town on the outskirts of Tokyo. He had quit his previous job to get away from the commotion of a major city and now enjoys his days surrounded by little girls.
Kiyoshi's shop is regularly visited by three girls in particular: Chie Sayama, Tenka Adachi, and Komako Semenovich. Due to his friendly and easygoing demeanor, the not-so-innocent girls quickly take to Kiyoshi, seeking his attention and help with their problems. They soon develop romantic feelings toward him and gladly leave their bodies in his care, passing time in his house by indulging in sexual pleasures.
(Source: MAL Rewrite)
Action, Adventure, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance

Yuuki Wakura watches as dueling supernatural forces ravage the Earth. Mato are portals to another dimension, avenues from which dangerous monsters escape. Peaches are resources given to women granting them abilities. Chief of the Seventh Unity of the Anti-Demon Corp, Kyouka Uzen arrives to save Yuuki from a monster. Surprisingly, Yuuki holds the power to increase the Peaches effectiveness. But to save the world, Yuuki must be willing to become Kyouka’s servant both on the battlefield and at home.
(Source: HIDIVE)
Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance

HYPNO is equipped with hypnosis, status window, nonsense and self-justification. He intends to build a harem using his new abilities in a new world! And... the first woman he meets in the new world is a married one with the hottest body!! (Source: TOPTOON+) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

Hyeon-U is an ordinary office worker whose life couldn't get any more boring. His new life begins with the sound of a message beep... "Engage in intercourse with a female employee, fail to do so and lose a month's salary." (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)
Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance

"Why did I turn into a character from an adult game?" The time has come now to take action! Lucius the loser character has transformed into a villain overnight. With his new found vengeance, Lucius will set out to enjoy the action packed, harem fantasy adventure!! (Source: TOPTOON+) Note: Includes four extra chapters.
Tensei Colosseum: Saijaku Skill de Saikyou no Onna-tachi wo Kouryaku Shite Dorei Harem Tsukurimasu

The story begins when high school boy Mikagami, whose only redeeming feature is his skills in video games, is summoned to a different world. He has only the weakest skill "Copy" and, for being useless, he is turned into a sword-fighting slave in the coliseum. Mikagami is pale in the face of the coliseum, where the worst punishment is that "the loser becomes the winner's slave and is mated". The story depicts how he uses his weakest skill "Copy" with the confidence that he has never lost in a "game" before, and how he manages to defeat the stronger players in a duel as if it were a game.
(Source: Comic Natalie)
